name: Odoo
tagline: Odoo is a suite of open-source business apps that cover all your company needs.
description:
Odoo is a suite of open-source business apps that cover all your company needs.

Docs: https://www.odoo.com/?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  odoo:
    image: odoo:18
    environment:
      - HOST=postgresql
      - USER=udff065aa5b
      - PASSWORD=316ed272b1ab0a2e8c0e6e184a79e581
    volumes:
      - odoo-web-data:/var/lib/odoo
      - odoo-extra-addons:/mnt/extra-addons
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - curl
        - -f
        - http://127.0.0.1:8069
      interval: 2s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 30
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42084:8069
  postgresql:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    volumes:
      - postgresql-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_USER=udff065aa5b
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=316ed272b1ab0a2e8c0e6e184a79e581
      - POSTGRES_DB=postgres
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - pg_isready -U $${POSTGRES_USER:-liv1084aad5} -d postgres
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
volumes:
  odoo-web-data: null
  odoo-extra-addons: null
  postgresql-data: null
